title: Adjuvant chemotherapy intensity and prognosis in completely resected high-grade neuroendocrine lung carcinoma: a post hoc analysis of JCOG1205/1206.
abstract: We aimed to clarify the prognostic impact of adjuvant chemotherapy intensity in patients with high-grade neuroendocrine carcinoma (HGNEC) of the lung using a post hoc analysis of the phase III JCOG1205/1206 trial comparing irinotecan plus cisplatin (IP) with etoposide plus cisplatin (EP).
